title: AI Robotics: Build Robots That See and Decide
subtitle: Computer vision. Reinforcement learning. Robots that adapt.
description: Edge is where robotics meets AI. You'll train computer vision models, implement reinforcement learning for robot control, build SLAM systems for mapping unknown environments, and deploy models to run on-robot hardware. This is the course that opens doors to robotics research roles, AI product companies, and deep-tech startups.
what_youll_learn: Train YOLOv8 models for real-time object detection in robot vision
Build a SLAM system that maps unknown environments from scratch
Implement reinforcement learning for robot navigation using PPO
Run inference on edge devices (Raspberry Pi, Jetson Nano)
Build a multi-modal perception pipeline: camera + lidar + IMU fusion
Architect a complete autonomous system from sensor to action
Evaluate and benchmark AI models for robotics deployment
Contribute to open-source robotics AI projects
waitlist_cta: Edge is in design. Join the research preview list.
